title: Welcome to Field Notes
body: Field Notes is the running log of what I'm building at Mapzimus — the tools, maps, games, and experiments, and what I learned making them.

Some of these notes will graduate into LinkedIn posts; this is where they get drafted, staged, and archived. If you want the polished portfolio, that's over at maxwellhowegis.com. This is the workbench journal.

title: Example draft (only visible with ?drafts)
body: Posts with status "draft" stay hidden from the public page. Open /field-notes/?drafts to preview them while staging a LinkedIn post. Change status to "published" when it's ready.
